Off Calendar May-14-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties; Declaration Of Mailing
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff PMGI Financial LLC's motion for entry of judgment is granted. No opposition filed. PMGI has shown that it is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Mark Henderson in the amount of $1,402.99, inclusive of attorney's fees and costs. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185 =302/hk
